name: Brussel Sprouts
recipeInstructions: (Fat 5.9. Chol. 0.) Wash Brussels Sprouts and discard discolored leaves. Cut off stem ends and slash the bottom of each sprout with a shallow X. Place sprouts in a small amount of boiling water; cover, reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes. Or until tender. Drain and cool slightly. Slice in half vertically. Melt margarine in a small saucepan. Cook over medium heat until browned. Pour over Brussels Sprouts; toss gently to coat. Sprinkle with pepper.
